creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Emcws enables Japanese input for Emacs20 as easy as Mule-2.3.
	The information about emcws is found at
	ftp://ftp.ki.nu/pub/emcws/README.html

	For this purpose, tamago (http://www.m17n.org/tamago/) is
	under developing.

Fix: 

A tarball is at
	http://www.heimat.gr.jp/~nakaji/FreeBSD/ports/emacs20-emcws-20001009.tar.gz

	In default, Wnn6 and Canna are needed. It should be separated
	like

	japanese/emacs20-emcws-canna
	japanese/emacs20-emcws-freewnn
	japanese/emacs20-emcws-sj3
	japanese/emacs20-emcws-wnn6
	etc

	as japanese/mule-* or japanese/xemacs21-* are separated.
